description_long: This is a modern, rectangular kitchen or utility sink with a single deep basin and an integrated draining board on one side. The sink is finished in a glossy black material, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. A tall, angular faucet with a right-angled spout is mounted at the rear edge, positioned to serve the basin. The draining board features subtle grooves to channel water toward the basin, and the basin itself is spacious enough for washing large items. The drain is centrally located within the basin, and the overall design is minimalist with clean, sharp edges. No overflow hole is visible in the basin.
description: Glossy black rectangular sink with a single deep basin, integrated draining board, and a tall angular faucet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sink, the deep basin on the right, and the draining board on the left with the faucet centrally positioned.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the depth of the basin, the faucet rising from the rear, and the flat draining board surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the basin now on the left, draining board on the right, and the faucet clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the faucet's attachment point and the overall rectangular shape, with the draining board and basin both visible.
